summary: PRED-105 silent-ignore verdict was already set on 2026-04-20 (our_verdict=silent_ignore, FAIL-009 logged). The empirical case has only strengthened: ~94h / 3.92d post-closure at last poll (2026-04-21T22:07Z), predictions.html byte-identical across 5 consecutive polls (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, 152,936 bytes), no manual commit from Nhughes09 in 4.42d, no goalpost-move, no WIN-070, no denominator movement. The internal PRED-105 arithmetic failure (sin⁻¹(H₀/R_eq)=25°, not 46°; and V50.6 H(r) forbids any constant-H derivation at r=R_eq) is already captured in predictions.json detail_reasoning. Recommend CLOSE ISS-1281 plus two optional additive staleness patches: (1) refresh PRED-105 verdict_notes in data/predictions.json with the 94h timing and byte-identical-polls evidence; (2) refresh FAIL-009 dome_ref_current/outcome/evidence_date in data/uncounted-failures.json. Neither changes the classification — they keep the record self-consistent with current poll evidence. Patch texts are in EXP-217.json under proposed_verdict_notes_patch and proposed_failure_record_patch.
